R5 baseline 14/14 passes — confirms working state before R6 changes

approach: tag cb_cur_sum_exp (slot 12) and cb_cur_mm_out (slot 21) with UnpackToDestFp32 so per-K-iter SFPU unpack preserves full fp32 mantissa (24 bits) instead of TF32 (10 bits); introduce untagged intermediate CBs cb_cur_sum_exp_for_divide (slot 11) and cb_cur_mm_out_for_divide (slot 20) for the final FPU mul_tiles_bcast_cols (incompatible with UnpackToDestFp32). Only allocate intermediates and apply tags when fp32_dest_acc_en=True

note: Verified that both list and VectorUnpackToDestMode assignment work for ComputeConfigDescriptor.unpack_to_dest_mode — current code using a Python list is correct.
